name: Carters XC Ski Center
description: Dave and Anne started Carters XC Ski Center in Oxford in 1984. It all began with Dave's mantra, "if you can walk, you can ski!' His vision was to get everyone on cross country skis.Today our ski center continues to be a family run business with Anne and her family providing an authentic winter experience. Come ski us again! Carters XC Ski Center has been announced as a new Indy Pass member for the 26/27 season. Access to this mountain does not begin until fall/winter 2026/27.
